selection_policy: GPT prompter selects only the first ready task for the lane unless that task is blocked, waiting_review, done, or stale.

tasks.title: Universe-specific live_readonly snapshot handling
tasks.objective: Keep exact-universe relative-value work moving by tightening live_readonly snapshot handling without weakening evaluator, settlement, or fee gates.
success_criteria: Universe-specific snapshot behavior is explicit and fail-closed.
Exact same-payoff continuation remains bounded to reviewed universes.
No PAPER_CANDIDATE is promoted without strict evidence and review.
Codex summary includes task id, files changed, tests, paper candidate count, and risk flags.
stop_conditions: Task would add live trading, auth, account, or order logic.
tasks.notes: Relative-value remains the primary profit-speed lane, but fake-edge killing is progress.

tasks.title: Diagnostic hint diff/schema/watchlist maintenance
tasks.objective: Keep graph outputs useful as diagnostic WATCH/MANUAL_REVIEW hints without creating paper candidates or evaluator integration.
success_criteria: No graph output is treated as executable or as a paper candidate.
stop_conditions: Task would integrate graph hints into relative-value evaluator trust.
Task would promote a hint into an executable signal.
tasks.notes: Graph is a structural hint lane, not a trading lane.

tasks.title: Weather maintenance-only bounded diagnostics
tasks.objective: Maintain weather evidence/replay/status hygiene without adding live APIs, auth, order logic, or real-money assumptions.
success_criteria: Maintenance task is bounded and diagnostic.
No live trading, account, auth, or order behavior is added.
Any candidate edge remains WATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW without paper promotion.
stop_conditions: Task would add live transport/auth/order logic.
tasks.notes: Weather is lower priority unless strict evidence-backed paper history appears.
